---
title: "Prepare GWAS"
---

### Overview

This pipeline 

***

### Workflow Logic



## Workflow Summary

1. `get_hg38_refs`: Download SLDSR hg38 reference files
2. `get_hg19_refs`: Download SLDSR hg38 reference files
3. `make_annot_maxCPP`: Generate MaxCPP annotation files from SuSiE output
4. `lift_hapmap3_snps`: Lift Hapmap 3 reference SNPs to hg38
5. `ldsr_ld_scores_hg38`: Generate LD score files for each cell type
6. `ldsr_strat_hg38_bl_v12`: Run stratified LD score regression with baseline version 1.2
7. `ldsr_report`: Summarise SLDSR score results per cell type


### GWAS Data

GWAS data were accessed from the following locations:

+ [Schizophrenia](https://figshare.com/ndownloader/files/34517828)
+ [Bipolar Disorder](https://figshare.com/ndownloader/files/49760772) 
+ [Major Depressive Disorder](https://figshare.com/ndownloader/files/51487022)
+ [ADHD](https://figshare.com/ndownloader/files/40036684)
+ [OCD](https://figshare.com/ndownloader/files/53357735)
